basics.name: Win Htaik Aung
basics.label: Software engineer with 6 years of industry experience and currently working with Android and  React.js with redux for native mobile apps and SPAs. For back end currently working with Python.  Proficient in object-oriented design, data structures, problem solving, complexity analysis, and debugging. Produce clean, maintainable and testable code with various testing approaches.  I love python but I am willing to pick up new languages as I believe language is a presentational syntax for what we want to do.  I would love to discuss about my experiences with you.Please feel free to reach me at winhtaikaung28@hotmail.com for quick chat .
